title.en: Ye Tian asked the machine spirit.

content.en:
"Machine Spirit, I remember that the Void Source Hall acquired the Devouring Source Dragon, 100,000 points each, why is it so expensive, could it be that the Devouring Source Dragon has any special use?"

Ye Tian asked the machine spirit.

After all, he hadn't heard the name of the Devouring Source Dragon at all from the report of the Machine Spirit just now, so he was a little curious, could it be that the Void Source Hall didn't acquire a Devouring Source Dragon?

The machine spirit replied, "Master, the value of devouring the Source Dragon is very high, it can devour the Exotic Heaven and Earth, and it can also devour the origin of the Eternal Source Thing, and it is closely related to the Void Source Monument. The Void Source Monument is an eternal source artifact that was born from the place where a large number of Devouring Source Dragons were killed in the ancient era, and after a long period of evolution. The Void Source Tablet has been supplying the Void Son to Enlightenment, and it is also consuming the Origin itself, and the Devouring Source Dragon can quickly make up for the Origin Consumption of the Void Source Monument. It was the Void Source Hall that had been acquiring and devouring the Source Dragon, and the origin of the Void Source Monument had always been at a level of more than ninety percent. “

"I see!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

"What about the Void Source Crystal, what did the Void Source Hall do when it acquired this treasure?" Ye Tian asked again.

The machine spirit explained: "The operation of the Void Tower requires the Void Source Crystal, and the Void Tower contains a large array inside, which can continuously condense the beasts, and the energy consumed is provided by the Void Source Crystal, otherwise the Void Tower will not be able to operate. In addition, the Void Source Crystal has another important use, which few people know, that is, it can allow the Void Source Body to grow twice, but it requires a lot of quantity, otherwise it is useless. "

"The Void Source Body can also grow a second time?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

"Yes!" "Yes!" the machine spirit said: "According to the previous master's setting, the Void Source Body must be re-grown in order to have any hope of breaking through the third layer of the Void Tower, but the main exception is that when the Void Source Body has not yet grown twice, it has passed the third layer of the Void Tower, if the master completes the second growth of the Void Source Body, the combat power of the same level will even surpass the previous master." "

"It turns out that the Void Source Ancestor's combat power standard for the third layer of the Void Tower is to require the Void Source Body to complete the second growth!"

Ye Tian understood.

No wonder he felt that the request of the third layer of the Void Tower was too perverted, it took him so much thought and time to pass, and there was even a hint of luck.

If he had known that there was such a solution, he might have ......

"If I had known this method, I wouldn't have been able to collect so many Void Source Crystals!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

"Machine Spirit, how many Void Source Crystals do I need to complete my Endless Source Body for secondary growth?" Ye Tian asked.

The machine spirit came over, probed Ye Tian's body, and said in surprise: "Master, your Endless Source Body is much stronger than the ordinary Void Source Body, and I am afraid that you need a lot of Void Source Crystals, I estimate that you need more than 50,000 of them." The Void Source Hall has been collecting Void Source Crystals, and it is also preparing for the master, and there are currently more than 130,000 Void Source Crystals, which is enough for the master to complete the second growth!"

"More than 50,000 Void Source Crystals are needed!"

Ye Tian was dumbfounded.

He had been letting the replica body wander for many years before he was lucky enough to obtain a Void Source Crystal, but now he needed more than 50,000 Void Source Crystals to allow the Endless Source Body to complete its second growth.

If he didn't rely on the Void Source Palace, he wouldn't be able to make the Endless Source Body grow a second time.

"I'm afraid that it is difficult for those top forces to collect so many Void Source Crystals, which is why the Void Source Hall is special, and they have been collecting Void Source Crystals for countless years, so they have collected so many Void Source Crystals. "

Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, he ordered the machine spirit to take all the Void Source Crystals.

He wants to absorb the Void Source Crystal to complete the secondary growth of the Endless Source Body, and once it is completed, his strength will usher in another qualitative change.

"Yes, master!"

The machine spirit entered the treasure house of the Void Source Hall and took all those Void Source Crystals.

"Machine Spirit, you go down first, I'm here for retreat and cultivation, if there is nothing important, don't disturb me!"

Ye Tian commanded.

"Yes, master!"

The machine spirit is gone.

Origin space.

Ye Tian retreated here, urging the Endless Source Body to absorb the Void Source Crystals.

One, two, three......

The Void Source Crystals were absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, but the Endless Source Body did not change, and the strength did not improve.

If it weren't for the machine spirit telling him that if he absorbed more than 50,000 Void Source Crystals, his Endless Source Body would have completed its secondary growth, and he wouldn't have absorbed and refined it like this!

It can be said that even if there is really a certain son of the void who is lucky enough to obtain so many Void Source Crystals, without knowing it, he will definitely not dare to absorb and refine the Void Source Crystals like this, otherwise if it is wasted, it will be enough to die of distress!

The years passed slowly, and in the blink of an eye, a dark time passed.

For such a long time, Ye Tian had fully refined 50,000 Void Source Crystals, but the second growth had not yet arrived, but he had already felt that the Endless Source Body was becoming stronger.

"It is estimated that there are more than 50,000 Void Source Crystals, and the machine spirit is only an estimate, and he can't accurately reach a specific number. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So, he continued to absorb and refine the Void Source Crystal, anyway, he had a lot of Void Source Crystals, and he was not afraid of consuming them.

51,000 pieces!

52,000 capsules!

53,000 pieces!

It wasn't until the time of 60,001 Void Source Crystals that Ye Tian's Endless Source Body had finally undergone a fundamental essential transformation.

Bang!!!!!

The Endless Source Body began to frantically absorb the Origin Energy, and the energy in the Source Sea also poured into Ye Tian's body, helping Ye Tian complete his second growth.

I don't know how long it has been, Ye Tian's transformation has been completed.

At this time, his body and soul were more than ten times stronger, which was the second growth.

It can be said that although Ye Tian is still in the realm of second-class invincibles, his strength is enough to easily kill those first-class invincibles in seconds, even those first-class invincibles who have condensed the eternal body are not his opponents.

Ye Tian felt that his strength was even enough to compete with the weaker Supreme One, this was the increase in strength brought by the second growth of the Endless Source Body.

"Congratulations to the master for completing the second physical growth!" the machine spirit appeared, and congratulated: "Master, after the previous master completed the second growth of the Void Source Body, the increase in the physical body and soul was seven times, and the increase in the master's physical body and soul reached at least eleven times, and the future master will definitely be stronger than the previous master, and is even expected to step into the realm above the Supreme One." "

"No need to boast, the realm above the Supreme One is too far away from me, I just want to be promoted to the first-class invincible realm now!"

Ye Tian said.

At this time, the machine spirit proposed: "Master, if a second-class invincible person wants to become a first-class invincible, he must merge the physical body and soul tribulation realm, and the master has completed the second growth of the endless source body, and the body and soul far surpass other second-class invincibles, so it is also difficult to fuse, the Void Source Hall does not have a suitable treasure land suitable for the master to impact the first-class invincible, but there is a treasure land in the source sea that is very suitable for the master, which can save a lot of time for the master." "

"Where?"

Ye Tian was curious.

The machine spirit said: "Yin Yang Qi Mountain!"
